Package org.openapitools.codegen

Class DryRunTemplateManager

java.lang.Object
org.openapitools.codegen.DryRunTemplateManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
public class DryRunTemplateManager extends Object implements org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
Manages templates for a generator "dry run"
